Meeting.title: Meeting
Meeting.description: Represents a counselling meeting and its corresponding Google Meet link

createdAt.description: When the meeting link was added

active.description: Whether the meeting is currently active

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: A single person who joined a specific counselling session

meetingId.description: The ID of the meeting they joined

userAgent.description: Browser User-Agent string of the participant

BlockedIP.title: Blocked IP
BlockedIP.description: An IP Address blocked from accessing meeting links

deviceId.description: The persistent device ID associated with this block

blockedAt.description: Timestamp when this IP was blocked

name.description: Last name used with this IP

BlockedDevice.title: Blocked Device
BlockedDevice.description: A unique hardware/browser fingerprint blocked from joining

blockedAt.description: Timestamp when this device was blocked

AdminSettings.title: Admin Settings
AdminSettings.description: System configuration values such as the admin application password

password.description: The current password used to log in to the admin panel

DemoParticipant.title: Demo Participant
DemoParticipant.description: A single person who joined a specific counselling session through demo mode

name.description: Full name of the demo participant

gmail.description: Gmail address of the demo participant (optional)

meetingId.description: The ID of the meeting they joined

userAgent.description: Browser User-Agent string of the participant

/meetings/{meetingId}.description: A collection containing Google Meet links and metadata

/participants/{participantId}.description: Participant details such as name, joined time, and IP address

/demoParticipants/{demoPartId}.description: Demo participant details such as name, joined time, and IP address

/blockedIPs/{ip}.description: Blacklisted IPs that are rejected from joining Google Meet links

/blockedDevices/{deviceId}.description: Blacklisted devices that are rejected even if using a VPN/different IP

/adminSettings/{docId}.description: Stores admin configuration parameters like panel password
